nasb.text: Then he went up from there against the inhabitants of Debir; now the name of Debir formerly was Kiriath-sepher.

esv.text: And he went up from there against the inhabitants of Debir. Now the name of Debir formerly was Kiriath-sepher.

cnv.text: 他又從那裡上去攻擊底璧的居民；底璧從前名叫基列．西弗。

ccb.text: 再从那里起兵攻打底璧，底璧以前的名字是基列·西弗。
